name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-10
title: SKILL.md 'What You Do NOT Do' contradicts its own Step 3 which invokes superpowers skills
description: SKILL.md 'What You Do NOT Do' section states 'Invoke any other skill'. However, Step 3 explicitly instructs invoking Skill('superpowers:brainstorming') and Skill('superpowers:writing-plans'). This is a direct self-contradiction that could confuse readers. Fix: reword to 'Invoke skills other than the superpowers invoked in Step 3 above'.
